case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. DELORES LEON et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, DELORES

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-30-2012 CONTINUED TO APR-30-2012 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE JAN-30-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMARY OF CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEON, DELORES $7,950.84 PRINCIPAL, $280.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,230.84, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, DELORES DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-06-2010
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $280.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $314.45 AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, DELORES
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AFTER DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-30-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
